title: achyranthes glomerata
intro: Achyranthes glomerata, also known as the Chinese bugbane or sticky snakeroot, is a plant species belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. Traditionally used in traditional Chinese medicine, Achyranthes glomerata is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Achyranthes glomerata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, as well as being dried and made into capsules or tablets for modern supplement use.
